item.title: Thursday Wholesome Dump To Warm Your Heart On A Cold Day (Having a bad week, we got you)
item.description:
1
2. cow friend :)
3. So question if it was you in that situation as a guy - do you offer to help these girls or would that be uncomfortable in this situation?
4
5. Beer girl living the best life
6. A little mooooo
7. You, you here is sock
8. Cute pupper on an adventure
9. "Wow, let me pet the cat too" A minute later: "Too much?"
10. Engineering Student decided to receive his degree in ceremonial indeginious attire
11
12. Yes, yes he is
13
14. pspspspspspsps
15. Today I wanted to share with you that I started reading this awesome book called 'Blood, Sweat & Pixels'. It's about the history of various indie and mainstream games and the struggle of the devs to get them done. I have to say it's very inspiring and it helps me on my own journey as a game dev. To be honest, I've been working on the same game for almost 18 months now and it can get a bit frustrating. Imagine having to hold your focus on one thing for so long (while juggling everyday life). However this book inspired me and helped me re-start my passion. Anyway, if you want to support the game, a simple wishlist would mean the world to me. Please check it out on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/ P.S. 1. This here is a plushie duck that I'm hoping a lot of players will develop affection for. P.S. 2HAVE A GREAT AND SUNNY WEEKEND, FRIENDOS!

item.title: Images of Note: Knowledge is the Heaviest Burden
item.description:
This is what so many queer servers are like
FISH!
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
PISS NUKE
OH NO!
Birthrates are dropping and the world fertility rate is at replacement rate right now.
Soon.
FINALLY!
He just kept on Yoing.
MEAT ROBOT
Love it when smug people learn things that make them unsmug.
PEGGING SAVES LIVES!
the next 4 years *at least*
:D
me :)
Like I know that is not what they are like Canonically, because they're also meant to be scholars and artists and the like, BUT I WANNA SEE MUSCLEBOUND HIMBO SPACE MARINES!
is this in relation to Doge?
Now which country is this.
AAAAA
monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch monch
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky The Onion has bought infowars. it's gonna get weird.
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Power Cosplay - Chainsaw Man
item.description:
If you know this scene you know this scene. I personally love this anime, its world building is dire and so much fun, and gives a pretty great read on labour and worker abuse... Late stage capitalism... ya know... light reading/viewing. I also own like 4 Pochitas because they are adorable so... I'm probably part of the problem.
Reference image... I will give no further context on this scene :D
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Keep Your Community Clean: Trash is Trash
item.description: NOTE: Before deleting the app, delete any content you have added to Twitter (or Facebook or whichever social media site your leaving). You have control over said content as long as you have an account, BUT the site claims ownership of anything there. If you leave/delete your account, the site STILL OWNS any info/data/media that remains. Remember to remove all of it FIRST before you delete your account.
item.dc:creator: WoodyGoodman

item.title: For THT

item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: I’m the worst person
item.description:
I had to wake up foster kitten Pumpkin Pie from a VERY well-deserved slumber to take her bandage off. The vet said I had to do it one hour after bringing her home. She was very sweet about it.
But she had her choice of tasty wet food to nibble on before going back to sleep.
She feels good enough to groom!! I literally cannot believe this is the same kitten from 36 hours ago. The Humane Society just shelled out a BOATLOAD of money to keep Pumpkin Pie alive. I got their wish list from them, and the least I can do is share it with you all. I am always amazed at the generosity of this community! You guys are THE BEST!! https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/2K634G59XZTP4?ref_=wl_share (Edit: Thank you, @ooglakkerman for bringing this up: many of you don’t want to donate something via Amazon, and trust me, I get it. But if you DO want to help out, you can always give to the Greater Huntsville Humane Society’s website: https://ghhs.org Click the “give now” button, and don’t be off-put by the recommended amounts. Just click “other amount” and give what you can. But if the spirit does move you to donate, please specify that it is for Pumpkin Pie. She is the reason for all of this, after all!)
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: "Noooo! Me Apple!"
item.description: Please give the ranch pupper another apple.
item.dc:creator: dashriproc1

item.title: I love you Imgur but…
item.description: Bring back the relatable posts, callback jokes, badly photoshopped celebrities, Batman and sprinklers, amalgamation memes like moths and bowsette. Those that have been here a while know what I’m talking about. I’m just here to have a good laugh and escape from reality a little bit. FP Edit: Love hearing all the perspectives. Send me your favorite memes.
item.dc:creator: WalkItOutLikeTheFlash
